plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the page URL included a hash fragment (#playwright-check-suite) after selecting a search suggestion, while the assertion expected a clean URL.
observedIndicators: Assertion failed with URL mismatch involving a hash fragment
page.ai completed the 'overallObjective' successfully before the assertion failed
Deterministic mode was used, and the tool calls show the AI clicked a link containing the hash

remediationSteps.summary: Relax the URL assertion to ignore hash fragments.
remediationSteps.details: Update the assertion on line 13 to be more resilient to URL fragments. Instead of toEqual(), use a regex or toContain() to ignore the hash: expect(page.url()).toContain('/docs/constructs/playwright-check/')

remediationSteps.summary: Update the expected URL string to match the deep-link path.
remediationSteps.details: If the hash is desired, update the expected string in the test to include '#playwright-check-suite'. However, relaxing the check is generally safer for search-based navigation.

plan.notes: The AI successfully followed the instructions to search and select the 'Constructs > DETECT' result. The resulting URL is semantically correct but technically differs from the hardcoded expectation in the test script due to the deep-link hash.
